description_long: This is a modern, geometric wooden shelving unit composed of two interlocking rectangular frames of different heights. The structure is made from light-colored wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a natural and contemporary appearance. One section features a central cuboid compartment with a solid back panel, while the other section is open, providing versatile storage or display space. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or decorative elements. The surfaces are flat and smooth, suitable for placing books, decor, or other items. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, light wood shelving unit with interlocking rectangular frames and a central cuboid compartment. Its minimalist design features open and closed sections for versatile storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the interlocking rectangular frames and the central cuboid compartment with a solid back panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and thickness of the wooden frame, with no visible compartments or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back panel of the central compartment and the open structure of the frames.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stepped profile and the solid wood construction.
